fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the journal.
The field is retrieved from the Name field in the Cost Journal Template table.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the entry number of the journal line.
This field is automatically filled in. It is used to keep track of various lines in the journal.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subtype of the cost center. This is an information field and is not used for any other purposes. Choose the field to select the cost subtype.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's posting date.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related document.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the cost journal entry.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the batch name of the cost journal.
You can select a new batch name from the available batch names or to create a new journal batch.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the type that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry in the cost journal.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance of the cost type.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost center code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost object code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cost center that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cost center that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is entered in the cost journal.
This field is not available on the page. It is filled with the Cost Journal Batch table and serves as an additional identification feature for the entry.

fields.name: G/L Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the corresponding general ledger entry that is associated with this cost entry. For combined entries, the entry number of the last general ledger entry is saved in the field. This is the entry with the highest entry number.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Cost Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the consecutive number that is assigned to the cost entry.

fields.name: Allocated
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the costs have been allocated.

fields.name: Allocation Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the allocation.

fields.name: Allocation ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the allocation ID.
The field is used to identify the allocation and create the connection to the allocation targets.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the amount in additional reporting currency for cost accounting reports.
If you have set up Additional Reporting Currency in the General Ledger Setup window, the amount is transferred from the general ledger entry to the cost journal entry.
The field is designed to show the amount in additional reporting currency for the Cost Types Details and Cost Acctg. Journal reports.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Debit Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the debit amount in additional reporting currency for cost accounting reports.
If you have set up Additional Reporting Currency in the General Ledger Setup window, the amount is transferred from the general ledger entry to the cost journal entry.
The field is designed to show the debit amount in additional reporting currency for the Cost Types Details and Cost Acctg. Journal reports.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Credit Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the credit amount in additional reporting currency for cost accounting reports.
If you have set up Additional Reporting Currency in the General Ledger Setup window, the amount is transferred from the general ledger entry to the cost journal entry.
The field is designed to show the credit amount in additional reporting currency for the Cost Types Details and Cost Acctg. Journal reports.

fields.name: Budget Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether budget entries or cost entries are used when you post allocated costs.
When the Budget Name field is filled in, budget entries are used. When the field is blank, cost entries are used.
